title: Material Handling Equipment Supplier Dubai
content:
As the name suggests, material handling equipment is used to transport large and often heavy materials in a production or construction environment. At Fabtech International, we specialize in manufacturing premium material handling equipment used in manufacturing, distribution, storage, and materials control. In addition to providing reliable material handling equipment service in Dubai, we take pride in delivering tailor-made solutions suitable for your requirements. Each model is geared to handle a particular type of cargo, including containers, grain, liquids, or bundles, depending on the creative design. With our extensive experience in fabricating pneumatic and continuous types of Ship Loaders/Unloaders, we can provide efficient solutions for all your bulk material handling needs.
As specialists in the industry, we manufacture a broad range of highly proficient material handling solutions which includes Grab Loaders/Unloaders, Screw Conveyors, Stacker Reclaimers, along with complete conveyor systems. When you choose our products, you benefit from increased efficiency of the work sequence as it assists and accelerates operations. Given the wide range of applications and requirements it entails, we take glory in offering a comprehensive range of equipment to our clients across the UAE. Get in touch with us today to learn more and avail of our reliable and highly durable heavy material lifting equipment.
Hire our Pneumatic ships, which come with a significant loading and unloading capacity, strong loading arms, and a radio remote control system for convenient use.
Simplify your onshore processes with a multifaceted machine able to handle heavy weight vessel loading. Given that it is always in stationary mode, you need not worry about transportation costs.
Do you have containers to move from one terminal to the next? No matter how tall or bulky, our port container cranes are handy for the job!
Hire our truck cranes for both domestic movements and/or large complex projects. We are well-versed with numerous lifting capabilities irrespective of the size and space required.
When in need of fast handling machinery, look no further than our Dockside cranes. Designed to handle different kinds of bulk and at any docking harbor.
Our Gantry crane inventory offers the best kind of flexible lifting equipment capable of lifting goods to different heights while still possessing the mobility advantage.
Conveyors are ideal for deploying free-flowing materials or semi-fluid substances that wouldn't otherwise adapt to conventional cranes. Our screw conveyors are affordable and durable.
If your yard length is limited yet still have a large volume of material, get your business our stacker reclaimer that works just as efficiently with confined spaces.
For optimum grab loaders, Fabtech provides fast and safe vessels with a capacity for great volumes. Also, work smarter thanks to our automated control system.

QAFCO-VI Pipe Conveyor

Ship Loader 1000 TPH

Stacker Reclaimer SR 2100

Continuous Ship Unloader

Mechanical Ship Unloader Combi

Mechanical Ship Unloader Portalink 800

SOHAR Ship Unloader 2000 TPH

Pneumatic Ship Unloader Multiport M6OO Capacity
MO 304, Jebel Ali free Zone, Dubai, UAE
